section.title: AI Exposure and Usage
section.description: This section asks about your general exposure to AI tools in your project management work.

questions.text: Use of AI-based Tools in Your Work:
questions.hint: Do you use any AI-powered tools in your project management duties?

options.label: No, not at all – I do not use AI tools in my work
Yes, rarely – I use AI tools infrequently (a few times a month or less)
Yes, occasionally – I use AI tools regularly, but not daily (e.g., a few times per week)
Yes, daily – I use AI tools daily or in nearly every project

questions.text: Types of AI Tools Used (Select all that apply):
questions.hint: Which of the following AI technologies or applications have you used for project management tasks?

options.label: General-purpose GenAI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Microsoft Copilot)
AI features embedded in PM software (e.g., Jira AI, Asana, Monday.com, Microsoft Project, Azure DevOps)
Scheduling or Resource optimization – AI-driven tools for scheduling, resource allocation, or timeline predictions
Predictive analytics – Machine learning tools for forecasting project outcomes, risk analysis, or effort estimation
Automated dashboards/Reporting – AI tools that aggregate data and create status reports or performance dashboards
Communication assistants – AI for translating languages, summarizing meetings, sentiment analysis
Process automation (RPA) – Robotic process automation bots to automate routine project administration tasks
Custom AI/ML models – AI/ML models built by internal teams for specific project management needs
None – I have not used any AI tools in project management
Other

questions.hint: How is AI integrated into your project management work?

options.label: Ad-hoc, individual use (e.g., separate chatbot in browser, personal experimentation)
Embedded into PM tools (e.g., Jira AI, MS Project AI features, Monday.com AI)
Organization-level AI policies (clear policies, governance, and standard tools)
Experimental / pilot only (testing in limited capacity)
Not applicable (I don't use AI)

questions.hint: Rate your agreement: 'My organization has clear policies and training on AI use in project management.'

options.label: 1 - Strongly Disagree
2 - Disagree
3 - Neutral
4 - Agree
5 - Strongly Agree
N/A (I don't use AI)
